name: Short fasting-mimicking diet pilot moved autophagic-flux and metabolic markers
summary: A pilot human FMD trial provides direct pathway-level evidence for autophagy engagement.
statement: An 8-day pilot randomized trial in 30 healthy participants found between-group changes in autophagic flux and metabolic markers after fasting-mimicking diet exposure.
caveats: The study was small and short-term.
The outcome is pathway engagement and metabolic-marker movement, not durable human function.
The study was sponsored by the diet-program sponsor.
